summary: 17 cases in added (12 API + 5 E2E) covering all 7 role endpoints and 5 UI journeys for the roles module. All required fields present, layer assignments match the API/E2E decision tree, no forbidden content in steps or assertions, delta operation correct (target qa/cases/roles/ does not exist so all entries are added). Seed values (admin / 123456, role names) are documented init_app.py defaults, not production secrets. Ready for downstream API plan and E2E plan.
